case_title: BROWN, AMY et al VS ZABALA, ANIDIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BROWN, AMY LEUNIG, KRISTINE WITTY, LEESA D. AS TO DEFENDANT ZABALA, ANIDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZABALA, ANIDIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, AMY LEUNIG, KRISTINE WITTY, LEESA D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZABALA, ANIDIA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT TO BE PAID AS FOLLOWS: $1000. T/B PAID BY 6/10/00 & $1070 T/B PAID BY 7/10/00. DEFT PAID $3000 TO PLFTS IN COURT ON 5/1/00 W/ CASHIERS CK.
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED MAR.1,2000 8:30 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.
PROOF OF SUBSTITUTED SERVICE ON ANIDIA ZABALA FILED
